sections.paragraph:
(“whom Jehovah spoke of,” i.e. promised, as if Theophrastus), [Amariah], pr.n.-

(1) 1 Chr. 5:33 (Eng. Ver. 6:7 ).-(2) 1 Chr. 5:37 (Eng. Ver. 6:11 ); Ezr 7:3. Comp. אֲמַרְיָהוּ No.1.-(3) Neh 10:4 12:2 , 13 Neh 12:13.-(4) Ezr 10:42.-(5) Neh 11:4.-(6) Zep 1:1.-(7) see אֲמַרְיָהוּ No. 2 .
